## Analyzers (1)

### [Maltiverse_Report v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/Maltiverse/Maltiverse_Report.json)
Get the latest Maltiverse report for an hash, domain or an IP address.

- **Author:** ottimo
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `hash`, `domain`, `ip`, `url`
